name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v4.96: bilingual Billing portal (operator lease invoices + ledger, read-only from Payday, AG-admin operator picker, invoice PDF + statement CSV download), operator Payday-link field (kennitala + customer id), and /api/v1/debug/payday probe to confirm the live Payday connection.
